## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see happen.

## Use Cases
Why would this be useful? Who would benefit?

## Examples
If applicable, link to examples or similar implementations.

## Alternative Approaches
Have you considered other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional Context
Any other information that might be helpful.
